programme.title: Metz vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Metz have lost 53% of their Ligue 1 matches against Lorient, compared to just 17% in Ligue 2. After drawing the reverse fixture 1-1 in January, Metz could avoid defeat in both of their matches against Lorient in the same season for the second time in their nine campaigns together in the top-flight, after having previously done so in 1998-99.

programme.title: Angers SCO vs Strasbourg - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Angers have conceded five or more goals in three Ligue 1 matches this season – a joint-high tally alongside Metz – with their heaviest defeat coming against Strasbourg. After three consecutive home defeats against them between 2020 and 2022, Angers won their last home Ligue 1 match against Strasbourg, which also took place on MD33 last season.
